zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前SOL/美元短线呈震荡偏弱格局，价格在66.7附近徘徊，未能有效突破上方均线压制，整体动能略显不足。短期偏空整理需观察反弹力度变化信号确认

技术指标方面，价格跌破20日均线67.39，MACD仍处负值区域，空头动能占优但未明显放大。短期趋势仍受均线压制若无法收复SMA20将延续回调压力偏弱运行需谨慎

下方支撑关注66.17日内低点与65.80区间，上方阻力位于67.40及68.20附近，突破需量能配合。若放量突破或打开上行空间关注信号

交易策略建议偏谨慎，短线可等待回踩支撑企稳后轻仓试多，若跌破66则趋势转弱需止损。同时建议控制仓位并分批布局避免追涨杀跌操作纪律

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana is currently in a tight consolidation phase against the US dollar, trading around 66.69 with a very narrow 24-hour range between 66.17 and 66.75. Despite a modest intraday gain of 0.79%, the broader structure remains slightly weak as price continues to hold below the 20-day simple moving average at 67.395. This positioning suggests the market is struggling to regain short-term bullish momentum and is instead oscillating within a low-volatility equilibrium zone.

Momentum signals reinforce this neutral-to-bearish tone. The MACD reading at -0.5600 indicates that downside momentum has recently dominated, although the limited price spread suggests that bearish pressure is not strongly accelerating. With the signal line not yet confirmed, momentum remains uneven and prone to short-term reversals. In this context, traders should treat MACD as a warning of fragility rather than a strong directional trigger.

From a structure perspective, immediate support is forming around 66.17, with a psychological floor near 66.00 that has repeatedly attracted buyers. A break below this zone could expose deeper support toward 65.50. On the upside, resistance is clearly defined at 66.75, followed by the more significant barrier at the SMA20 near 67.40. A sustained move above this level would be required to shift bias back toward recovery.

Trading conditions currently favor range-bound strategies rather than trend following. Buying near support with tight risk control and taking profits near resistance remains the most efficient approach. However, traders should stay alert for a volatility expansion: a breakout above 67.40 could signal trend recovery, while a breakdown below 66.00 may trigger a fresh bearish leg.
